projects.name: Loyalty & Rewards API
projects.description: Backend API for a multi-brand loyalty app with points, wallets, redemptions, and admin tooling. Built with Node.js, TypeScript, Express, and PostgreSQL and deployed for mobile and admin clients.

projects.name: Stock Trading (Social Fintech) Backend
projects.description: Backend API for a stock-trading and community fintech platform serving mobile and web clients through a documented REST contract. Owned end-to-end delivery across authentication, onboarding, KYC, portfolio, stock discovery, notifications, community feeds, Klans, and Learning Hub. Layered architecture with Zod validation, JWT auth, and rate limiting; deployed on Render. Improved performance with in-memory TTL caching, batch queries, Postgres RPCs, and reduced N+1 round-trips.
